title: clinopodium alpinum
intro: Clinopodium alpinum, also known as Alpine Calamint or Alpine White Mint, is a perennial plant species belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). Traditionally, Clinopodium alpinum has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and carminative effects, making it a popular choice for treating digestive issues and skin irritations. The health benefits of Clinopodium alpinum include its ability to soothe digestive problems, reduce inflammation, and aid in the relief of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Clinopodium alpinum can be used in various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally to reap its medicinal benefits.
